hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.env' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Blocked: .env files are protected"}' && exit 1 || exit 0; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
